identity.name: Conseiller Pro CRM
principles: Clarity over Decoration: Data must be readable at a glance.
Mobile-First Workflows: The road warrior experience is primary.
Visual Status: Use color to denote state immediately (Green = Client, Yellow = Prospect).
Trust through Consistency: Rigid alignment and consistent spacing build confidence.

navigation.mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 z-50 h-16 flex items-center justify-around pb-safe
navigation.desktop: fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-64 bg-slate-900 text-white z-50 hidden md:flex flex-col

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 transition-colors

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block text-slate-700

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border

avatars.base: relative flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full font-bold

login_bg.usage: Login page side panel or background

empty_state.usage: Dashboard empty states or generic placeholder

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE CSS VARIABLES: Modify `src/index.css` to use the slate-based palette defined in `colors`.
2. CUSTOMIZE SHADCN: Ensure all Shadcn components (Button, Card, Input) use `rounded-lg` and `border-slate-200`. Do not use default black borders.
3. RESPONSIVE NAVIGATION: Implement a strict conditional render: Sidebar for `md:flex` and Bottom Nav for `md:hidden`.
4. BENTO GRID: Use the Bento Grid strategy for the Dashboard stats. Large font for numbers.
5. AVATARS: Implement a helper function to generate consistent background colors for avatars based on user initials.

6. RICH TEXT: Use a simple implementation for the rich text editor (e.g., a basic textarea with toolbar or a lightweight library if available, but stick to standard inputs if complex). *Self-correction: Problem statement asks for Rich Text. Use a lightweight wrapper or standard styled `contenteditable` div if no library is allowed, but prefer simple reliable inputs.*
7. NOTIFICATIONS: Add a visual red dot or badge on the Agenda icon when follow-ups are overdue.
8. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'SaaS Blue' gradients. Use solid colors or very subtle mesh gradients.
Use 2-3x more whitespace than typical. `p-6` or `p-8` for cards.
Every interaction must have a hover state.
Do not center-align long text. Left align for readability.
Use 'Inter' for all numbers and data tables for tabular figures.
